item.title: Industrious Coworking Day: Summer Series
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 8:30 AM

Location: Industrious, 4201 Main St, Houston, TX, 77002

Register here: https://luma.com/lpkh8qjc ​Spend the day working from Industrious at the ion. ​Join us for a free coworking day and experience what a better workday can feel like. Bring your laptop, settle in, enjoy coffee and refreshments, and get your work done in a space designed for focus, comfort, and connection. ​Whether you’re working solo, meeting a colleague, or looking for a new home base for your team, this is an easy way to experience Industrious firsthand. ​During the day, you’ll have access to: ​• Thoughtfully designed shared workspace • Coffee, breakfast, and snacks • Comfortable common areas • On-site support from our local team • Opportunities to connect with other professionals in the space ​As well as our Grant Writing Workshop! ​Industrious offers coworking, private offices, suites, meeting rooms, and flexible workplace options for individuals and teams. With 250+ locations across 80+ cities globally, we make it easier to find a workspace that works for you. Space is limited. RSVP to reserve your spot. ​Parking: Parking is free for the first 3 hours, then $10 for the remainder of the day. ​We look forward to welcoming you!

From Ion District

Event details

item.title: Latino Founders Forum - Lymbar Hosted
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: The Lymbar

Register here: https://luma.com/Latino-Founders-Forum The June edition of the Latino Founders Forum Houston is on June 30th ⚽🎉 ​After a strong launch that brought out 50+ founders, operators, investors, creatives, and professionals, the forum is keeping the momentum going with a special World Cup Celebration edition of our monthly gathering. ​Yes, it’s called Latino Founders Forum — but it’s not only for Latinos. Anyone is welcome to pull up, grab a drink, wear their favorite soccer jersey, make meaningful connections, and be part of the community. ​This is a monthly event for people building real things in Houston. While the forum is rooted in supporting and elevating Latino founders, the room is open to anyone who values entrepreneurship, culture, community, and genuine relationships. They’re back at The Lymbar inside the Ion for another high-quality happy hour designed to bring together founders, funders, advisors, builders, creatives, and professionals who want to meet ambitious people in a room that actually feels worth being in. ​This month, they’re bringing a World Cup vibe to the night and inviting guests to wear their favorite soccer jersey as we celebrate culture, connection, and community in Houston. Expect a great atmosphere, strong energy, good drinks, and the kind of conversations that make these events worth showing up for. ​Come for the jerseys, drinks, and festive energy. Stay for the people, the conversations, and the chance to be part of Houston’s growing startup and business community. ​If you came to one of the earlier events, you already know the energy. If you haven’t yet, this is a great one to start with. ​Built by founders. Powered by community. Open to everyone.

From Ion District

Event details
